# AI Context for @json-express/transport-fastify

A high-performance HTTP server transport for JSONExpress using Fastify.

## Setup
```typescript
import { FastifyTransport } from '@json-express/transport-fastify';
kernel.registerTransport(new FastifyTransport());
```

## AI Instruction
- Do not try to add Express-specific middleware (`app.use`) to the kernel when using this transport.
- Always use `@json-express/core` middleware which is transport-agnostic.
